reviews.review_title: Don’t waste your time and money
reviews.review_description: At the beginning during early access it was pretty great game, but later they changed everything and out from nowhere set a huge price tag for rubbish. If they return to the first idea and set one-time-purchase a reasonable price ($10) - it can be hit!

I bought it and it was ok, with some bugs but playable.

Then they changed it all to make it strange and it keep me away for some time, when I came back it was a subscription service that dosen’t allow you to even try it.

It is not surprising that the good reviews are from several years ago, before the change.

Can someone please assist with accessing Rapid Fire? i can get AirPistol but thats all. What am i doing wrong?
For review purposes i found airpistol to be reasonable compared to what else is out there....which is nothing so take from that what you will
does not accurately reflect the value of the results. The gun starts to vibrate in the picture without my hand actually vibrating.
I thought I'd paid to unlock what I want in early access but now looks like I need to pay 25 bucks a month to do anything. Wish they had a cheaper basic tier minus all e frills with 1 time payment.
Downloaded the app in hopes to help my kids train for their competitions. Nope instant pay wall. Cannot do anything inside the game.  Disappointed

So when I first got this game, I could visit the different areas and try out some different guns. The controls were extremely difficult to get the hang out - navigating was tedious, and the guns just were “ok” to use. 

I chalked this up to being early development glitches figured I’d leave it awhile to get the bugs ironed out.

Come back to the app. Completely different environment. Now I’m in some “closed off” range and immediately hit with a paywall. $19.99  freakin’ MONTH or $199.99 a year (?!?) to access anything. 

Ridiculous! Absolutely no VR game on fhe Quest is worth that ridiculous price tag. Nice try, scammers, but it was an insta-delete of your already glitchy game after that bait and switch.
stupid
You have to pay to play
How do I get this out of my library forever?
gotta pay for everything basically nd the guns r horrible

Ok, so i just bought this "game" and i hope there will be updates real soon.

So i shoot pistol at 25 meters usally, and think this can help with some practice i real life some what, like mind set, breathing, trigger pull, not like a mushy quest trigger ever gone feel like a real gun trigger but non the less.

Pros: 
Nice gun models.
Hit placement on the target is easy to see.
Graphics looks good.
Fireing sounds

Dont take me wrong here but, as of now this feels
like pre alfa almost.

Cons:
Cant turn of music or change volyme.
Why can you move around with teleport at all, better to be bound to like a box where you shoot.
If you can move, you will try and go places even were you cant, tried the air rifle course and "walked" to the door, then the rifle got stuck in the doorway XD...

And now to the more important things.

Must be able to adjust the guns position in your hand.
Choosing between holding grip button or just one press to hold the weapon, or fatigue will set in sooner.
Why the need to use both grip and trigger to grip a pellet, i think its a bit fiddley and and takes away concentration from the real goal, aiming and shooting the gun (just my thought).

I would even like to see different types of sights, or be able to adjust it to my needs.
Different sight posts thickness, the gap for the sightblades (now its to much distance for my likings).

Be able to choose to do a 5 shoot series rather then 10.

A different colour on the last hit on the score board.

I have high hopes for this, because this can be a good shooting tranier not just for air pistol/rifle shooters, but for shooters in general that whant to practice with out the price for real ammo.

It is quite a nisch "game" trainer thingy but you are on the right track, it just needs more love
to be better.

Ok so i have ranted enough, sorry for the bad spelling, but english is not my native language.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing detailed feedback ! Really Appreciate it. 

We are removing joystick and adding teleport for movement. Some of the bugs that you mentioned, those would be fixed in the next update. Quite few improvements and upgrades are in the plans. Stay tuned and keep supporting us.

reviews.review_description: It's very good! It is very natural and I find myself automatically falling into my routine. If I may add a few suggestions: Can you simulate shooting glasses? It would be nice to have the option to put an opacity adjustable blinder over the non-shooting eye and perhaps a zoom optical lens to correct the inherent blur and pixelation of the Quest 2 resolution. Besides this, I think the only other enhancement to the experience is a clamp-on weight holder to add weight and balancing to the controller. Thank you for all your work so far!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for a detailed review, and great to know it feels natural to you as your routine. 
Another player on our Discord suggested adding blinder, we will definitely work on it.
Can't guarantee about the Mount (weight holder) at moment. We are looking for partners or we ourselves might manufacture one in a few months.

reviews.review_description: Early days yet as they say, but quite impressed.  I shoot 10m pistol for fun and found this very realistic. Picking up a pellet is a bit sensitive but assume that will improve.  I can’t find a way to adjust the sights which would add to the realism.  Nice to see the shots on the card to the left of the firing position. If the devs can keep up the good work and progress to field target I would be very happy.  Often thought FT would be perfect for vr. Looking forward to what comes next.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for trying out the game and sharing your feedback!
We have been constantly improving the experience and this feedback helps us.

You can expect a lot more from us in the coming months including new game events, better game mechanism and of course sight adjustments. :)

We will keep users updated with change logs on our Discord and website.

About FT, we are not sure how many people really play it. But if it’s a sizeable chunk we will definitely add it in our roadmap.

reviews.review_description: The game looks great, aiming is very natural and realistic, and helps me practice between club sessions. There are some small dents here and there but they're easily straightened over time. If they came up with custom grips for controllers for added realism this would be an end-all-be-all trainer at home.

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate your review. 
And thanks for custom grips suggestion. We will plan to include it in our roadmap.

reviews.review_description: How do you get the weapons to play. Game is totally useless without the weapons. No instructions either…So far not a very good shooting game. Whoever wrote it needs to fix the bugs..Thanks
This app is not even close to being usable

For several years, now, I am doing air pistol shooting competitions. Thus, the project to create a simulation is very very interesting and I am grateful, that someone takes up this challenge. With regard to the current status of this project, I have two contributions.

First, it seems that to start the game, one has to make a small payment to obtain "credits", which then, that's how I understood it, unlock the options to obtain shooting gear. Unfortunately, my only means of payment is a VISA card and the system seemingly does not accept it. Which seems to be due to the additional security code, VISA requests and which the system cannot handle. Or can it ?

Secondly, a more fundamental caveat. The pivotal thing with air pistol shooting is to aquire the technique and mental state to overcome trigger resistance in a smooth way. Now, a Meta Quest controller has no trigger resistance. But without this, it would not be advisable to engage in a simulation, because it would ruin your real life technique and mental strategies. I suggest that a solution for this will be created, e.g. by developing a air pistol gun design, which can add this trigger resistance to the Meta Quest controller.

Note: I had written this contribution in English, but find that it appears in a lousy German translation.

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you very much for your answer. Based on various inputs we received from users & athletes, we are making some really BIG updates to Pro Shooter VR based on the real-world sport and its scenarios. Please hang back and you'll see some great things from us in the next few weeks.

reviews.review_description: First this game is all about bugs second there is no sounds third  literally ther is nothing you can do just please dont try it and if you did uninstall it immediately this is for your own good ￼
Nothing worked.
